TC_Title: Verify News Feed section visible on Dashboard
Preconditions: 1. Application URL accessible. 2. Employee user logged in.
Test steps: 1. Login with valid employee credentials. 2. Navigate to /dashboard. 3. Locate News Feed block beside Today's Status.
Expected result: 1. News Feed heading is visible. 2. Subtext is shown: announcements, birthdays & work anniversaries for your circle.

TC_Title: Verify news list loads from API
Preconditions: 1. Employee logged in. 2. Backend returns news_feed array for user circle.
Test steps: 1. Open /dashboard. 2. Open DevTools Network. 3. Confirm GET /api/auth/news-feed with Authorization header. 4. Observe News Feed list.
Expected result: 1. API returns 200 and success with news_feed array. 2. Each item shows title, content, and formatted date.

TC_Title: Verify empty state when no announcements
Preconditions: 1. Employee logged in. 2. API returns empty news_feed or no items.
Test steps: 1. Open /dashboard. 2. Wait for load. 3. Observe News Feed area.
Expected result: 1. Message No announcements yet. is displayed. 2. No bullet list of items.

TC_Title: Verify each item shows title and content
Preconditions: 1. Employee logged in. 2. At least one news item exists.
Expected result: 1. Title appears in item heading. 2. Content paragraph shows body text.

TC_Title: Verify created date displayed per item
Preconditions: 1. Employee logged in. 2. Items include created_at.
Test steps: 1. Open /dashboard. 2. Check meta row under each item.
Expected result: 1. Date/time is shown per app formatDate rules.

TC_Title: Verify Attachment link opens when file present
Preconditions: 1. Employee logged in. 2. Item has file_url or file_path.
Expected result: 1. Link opens in new tab. 2. Resolves from file_url or /static/uploads/ file_path.

TC_Title: Verify no Attachment when file absent
Preconditions: 1. Employee logged in. 2. Item has no file_url and no file_path.

TC_Title: Verify birthday type shows cake prefix and styling
Preconditions: 1. Employee logged in. 2. Item type is birthday.
Expected result: 1. Title may show cake emoji prefix. 2. Item has birthday styling class.

TC_Title: Verify anniversary type shows celebration prefix and styling
Preconditions: 1. Employee logged in. 2. Item type is anniversary.
Expected result: 1. Title may show celebration emoji prefix. 2. Item has anniversary styling class.

Preconditions: 1. Employee logged in. 2. Enough items that list scroll height exceeds visible area.
Test steps: 1. Open /dashboard. 2. Note auto-scroll behaviour. 3. Hover mouse over News Feed section. 4. Move mouse away.
Expected result: 1. Scrolling pauses while hovered. 2. Auto-scroll resumes after mouse leaves.

Preconditions: 1. Employee logged in. 2. Multiple items overflow list.
Test steps: 1. Open /dashboard. 2. Scroll the news list with wheel or drag scrollbar.
Expected result: 1. User can scroll list. 2. Content remains readable and aligned.

TC_Title: Verify News Feed under slow network
Preconditions: 1. Employee logged in. 2. DevTools throttling e.g. Slow 3G.
Test steps: 1. Hard refresh /dashboard. 2. Wait for News Feed.
Expected result: 1. Page remains stable. 2. News Feed eventually shows data or empty state. 3. No permanent white screen.

TC_Title: Verify News Feed API failure does not break Dashboard
Preconditions: 1. Employee logged in. 2. Simulate /api/auth/news-feed failure or block request.
Expected result: 1. News Feed shows no items or empty handling. 2. Rest of dashboard still usable. 3. No crash.

TC_Title: Verify unauthenticated user cannot access dashboard News Feed
Preconditions: 1. Application accessible. 2. User not logged in.
Expected result: 1. Redirect to login or home. 2. News Feed data not shown without auth.

TC_Title: Verify News Feed responsive on mobile viewport
Test steps: 1. Open /dashboard. 2. Resize to mobile or use device mode. 3. Inspect News Feed section.
Expected result: 1. Section remains readable. 2. Controls and links usable. 3. No severe horizontal overflow or broken grid.

TC_Title: Verify new announcement appears after HR publishes (integration)
Preconditions: 1. HR user can publish News Feed. 2. Employee in same circle.
Test steps: 1. HR adds announcement. 2. Employee refreshes /dashboard or reopens app.
Expected result: 1. New item appears in News Feed list with correct title and content.

TC_Title: Verify long title and content wrap without layout break
Preconditions: 1. Employee logged in. 2. DB has item with very long title and content.
Expected result: 1. Text wraps. 2. No overflow breaking adjacent dashboard panels.
